title: April 2022
description: Read the latest news and press releases from the U.S. Naval Academy for April 2022, featuring scholarship announcements and student projects.
text:
PRESIDENT BIDEN TO SPEAK AT NAVAL ACADEMY GRADUATION
ANNAPOLIS, Md. — The 46th President of the United States, Joseph R. Biden Jr., is scheduled to address the Naval Academy’s Class of 2022 during the graduation and commissioning ceremony, Friday, May 27, at ...

Winning Wordle with Data Science
The new popular game Wordle has been trending across the globe, but here at the U.S. Naval Academy (USNA), professors like Joel Esposito have taken to implementing the game into his new data science and artificial intelligence (AI) elective ...
